title: Build Projects and Agents read-only flows with nested tabs
summary: Implement the dashboard-equivalent Projects and Agents surfaces first in read-only mode, including nested detail tabs.
scope: Project list and project detail shell
Agent list and agent detail shell
Nested tabs for project and agent sections
Shared list/card components for reusable entity presentation
deliverables: nested tab routing for project and agent screens
acceptance_criteria: Projects and Agents lists load from Sloppy APIs
Detail screens open from list selection
Nested tabs preserve route state and selected entity
